changeSet.author: Kasovich Pavel
changeSet.sql: UPDATE users u SET first_name = CASE WHEN cardinality(x.parts) = 1 THEN x.parts[1] WHEN cardinality(x.parts) = 2 THEN x.parts[1] ELSE x.parts[2] END, last_name = CASE WHEN cardinality(x.parts) = 1 THEN x.parts[1] WHEN cardinality(x.parts) = 2 THEN x.parts[2] ELSE x.parts[1] END, patronymic_name = CASE WHEN cardinality(x.parts) > 2 THEN array_to_string(x.parts[3:array_upper(x.parts, 1)], ' ') ELSE NULL END FROM ( SELECT id, regexp_split_to_array(btrim(name), '\s+') AS parts FROM users WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND btrim(name) <> '' ) x WHERE u.id = x.id;
UPDATE users SET first_name = split_part(email, '@', 1) WHERE first_name IS NULL; UPDATE users SET last_name = 'User' WHERE last_name IS NULL;
